ideation: This animation sequence depicts a protective and affectionate pose, reflecting the family bond represented by the emoji. The larger figure (man) will have arms slightly out to the sides, while the smaller figures (boys) will be nestled close, suggesting care and safety.  The movement will start with the man's arms slightly raised, then gently lowering to embrace the boys, and finally settling into a comfortable protective position.  The boys' arms will remain close to their bodies throughout.

frames.beat: man's arms open slightly, a welcoming gesture
arms lower and curve inward, embracing the children
both arms settle protectively, a father's embrace
